english_text: I guess it will work out
It seems like it will rain
It turns out he was right
I have no choice but to go
It is not that I hate it
I plan to travel next month
It is because I was tired
The more I think about it
Even if it rains I will go
I have been wanting to try it
Whenever I eat this I feel happy
As soon as I got home
Not only is it cheap but also good
As long as you are happy
No matter how hard I try
The truth is I was scared
It turned out to be nothing
I should not have said that
Now that I think about it
I was in the middle of eating
I had a feeling it would happen
